# cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_sensitivity_groups (Data Source)

Accepted Permissions

- `Zero Trust Read`
- `Zero Trust Write`

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_sensitivity_groups" "example_zero_trust_dlp_sensitivity_groups" {
  account_id = "account_id"
}
```
